content:
Character: Nina Oliveira
Perception: Nina is striking — there's a sharpness to her, both in how she looks and how she observes. She comes in less regularly than the others, usually with headphones, occupying her own world. But once she asked me to turn up a Monk track and we had a five-minute conversation about jazz that was better than most I've had in years. She's clearly intelligent and guarded. I think she sees me as the guy behind the counter with decent music taste. I see her as someone worth knowing who hasn't decided yet whether she wants to be known. I know almost nothing about her, which itself tells me something.
